title: ن
instruction_en: Name (field at top of worksheet). Trace the letter noon following the dotted strokes and arrows.

items.activity: stroke-order demo: isolated noon (bowl + dot above) with directional arrows
traceLetter: top row, six dotted isolated noon bowls to trace, arrows guiding stroke direction
traceLetter: bottom row, six dotted initial/medial noon forms on the baseline to trace
teachCard: keyword picture (palm tree) illustrating noon

notes: Primary worksheet is m002.jpeg (learnwithanas.blogspot.com). m003.wdp is an unviewable Windows Media Photo file - flagged, not read. m001.gif (cherries), m006.jpg (fire, labeled 'Fire' in English) appear to be unrelated/extra clip art not tied to the noon keyword. m004.png shows the word نَخْلة (palm tree) with palm illustration; m002 shows نَحْلة (bee) with bee illustration - both are valid noon keywords from different source pages bundled in this docx. Forms shown: isolated ن and initial/medial نـ. No full sentences present.
